'''Hokkor Long''' was the [[Secretary in Charge of Scheduling]] for the [[Imperial Entertainers' Guild]]. In a communication to [[Viceprex/Legends|Viceprex]] [[Mirkovig Hirken|Hirken]] on [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]], Hokkor Long apologized for rescheduling a visiting troupe of entertainers the Vice-President had requested. The communication was intercepted by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and used to his advantage in his attempt to spring his co-pilot [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] during the [[Liberation of Stars' End]].
